task_completion.description: Navigate to the Reports or Schedule Reports section in EventLog Analyzer
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ManageEngine EventLog Analyzer interface is visible with the 'Reports' tab or scheduling interface active.
The 'Logon Reports' category is expanded, selected, or visible in the report selection menu.
The 'Successful Logon' report is checked, highlighted, or added to the list of reports to be scheduled.

task_completion.description: Set the schedule frequency to Weekly
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Weekly' option is selected in a dropdown or radio button within the schedule configuration settings.

task_completion.description: Set the schedule day to Monday and save
task_completion.visual_evidence: The day 'Monday' is selected for the weekly schedule, and the schedule is saved (indicated by clicking a save button or a success confirmation).

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the graphical user interface of the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show standard web browser interaction with the ManageEngine web interface, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent used the actual ManageEngine EventLog Analyzer application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The authentic ManageEngine EventLog Analyzer UI is visible, rather than a text editor, notes app, or mock interface.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the schedule configuration.
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer console or DOM inspector is open in the screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target report is 'Successful Logon' located under the 'Logon Reports' category. The schedule frequency must be set to 'Weekly' and the execution day must be 'Monday'.
